description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI and CD that runs on push to the master branch and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: tests and deploy. The tests job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, logs in to the GHCR container registry, starts the environment with make start-containers, and runs tests with make params=-T tests. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the tests job, checks out the repository, and runs an Ansible playbook with specific options and environment variables.
